title: EmotesPlugin
description: ZDev's Emotes is an advanced plugin for Paper 1.20.1 that adds a system of emotions between players to the game.
body:
The Emotions by ZDev plugin is an innovative solution for Paper 1.20.1 servers that adds a system of emotions and social interactions between players to Minecraft. Make your server more lively and emotional with dozens of animations and settings!

* What does the plugin add?
More than 30 emotions – from friendly to romantic, aggressive (adaptable to any audience).

Ignore system – Players can block emotions from unwanted users.

Flexible customization – all texts, names of emotions and their effects can be easily edited in config.yml.

Simple animations, such as hand waving, hugs, kisses, and other visual effects.

Multiplayer support – emotions work between all players on the server.

Why should I install it?
 Improves social interaction – players will be able to express emotions, which will make the game more lively and exciting.
✅ Flexible settings – can be adapted to any type of server (RP, RPG, mini-games, etc.).
✅ Easy to use – intuitive commands and configuration.
✅ Optimization for Paper – the plugin works quickly and without lags.

With Emotions by ZDev, your server will become more emotional, and the players will become closer to each other! 😊🎭
